privileged_info_summary: The clinical_app_evaluation_report task requires agents to evaluate OpenICE clinical applications by (1) creating at least 2 distinct simulated medical device adapters from available types including Multiparameter Monitor, Infusion Pump, Pulse Oximeter, CO2/Capnograph, NIBP, and Ventilator, and (2) launching at least 2 different clinical demo applications from the set: Vital Signs, Infusion Safety, Patient ID, Xray Viewer, and Clinical Alarms. The evaluation report must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/clinical_app_evaluation.txt and include clinical terminology such as monitoring, safety, patient care, waveforms, thresholds, and interlock mechanisms. OpenICE is a real open-source medical device interoperability platform developed by the MD PnP program at Massachusetts General Hospital; all referenced devices and applications are authentic components of the system.
